deities.name: Aakriti
deities.edicts: Create without reservation, help others unlock their true potential, observe the mysteries of life
deities.anathemas: Fail to study a new creature if safely able, force a creature to live in the wrong body, reject creatures or information due to bigoted or rigid beliefs

deities.name: Abadar
deities.edicts: bring civilization to the frontiers, earn wealth through hard work and trade, follow the rule of law
deities.anathemas: engage in banditry or piracy, steal, undermine a law-abiding court

deities.name: Abraxas
deities.edicts: Learn and hoard forbidden magic, steal secrets from others
deities.anathemas: Destroy forbidden lore, reveal the entirety of a secret

deities.name: Acavna
deities.edicts: Protect the weak and innocent, use defense as your first resource, make choices for the good of all and not the good of one
deities.anathemas: Attack without cause, ignore the pleas of the weak and innocent, act solely for your own self interest

deities.name: Achaekek
deities.edicts: conduct assassinations, spread the Red Mantis’s infamy, wield sawtooth sabers in combat
deities.anathemas: kill a rightful ruler, become fixated on petty matters such as others’ gender or ancestry, abandon an assassination contract you agreed to pursue

deities.name: Adanye
deities.edicts: Keep your counsel, follow your heart, appreciate a warm hearth, defend those who welcome you into their home
deities.anathemas: Force anyone into drudgery or mindless work, deny support to loved ones, surrender when escape is an option, destroy a place that has given you shelter

deities.name: Aegirran
deities.edicts: Sail the seas, offer a place for weary travelers to rest their heads, love and respect those you’re in relationships with
deities.anathemas: Betray a loved one’s trust, kill someone while they sleep, purposely pollute natural bodies of water

deities.name: Aerekostes
deities.edicts: Make items, treat items well, prepare for many possibilities
deities.anathemas: Destroy an intelligent item

deities.name: Aesocar
deities.edicts: Provide healing and aid to those who need it, promote the value of connecting faith and science, strive to defend and protect others in battle
deities.anathemas: Do unnecessary harm, spread disease, fail to aid someone in need

deities.name: Ah Pook
deities.edicts: nurture the fears and doubts of others, withhold your true intentions, make others realize the weight of their acts
deities.anathemas: guide others to overcome their fears and insecurities, provide swift relief to the suffering of others, save someone from a cruel fate brought about by their own hand

deities.name: Ahriman
deities.edicts: Foil rulers, the proud, and the powerful; ruin anything created by mortals
deities.anathemas: Create arts or crafts, serve a mortal, assist in mortal aims except to subvert and corrupt them

deities.name: Alazhra
deities.edicts: Break down barriers between planes, instill nightmares in others, work with hags and their covens
deities.anathemas: Betray a hag without good cause, draw the ire of an Apocalypse Rider, relieve the nightmares of others

deities.name: Aleth
deities.edicts: offer hospitality to travelers who arrive at your abode at night, protect others from the harshness of the light, seek out the infinite mysteries hidden in the darkness
deities.anathemas: expose others’ privacy, speak a truth that is more harmful than silence, violate hospitality once offered

deities.name: Alglenweis
deities.edicts: Protect the monuments of your people, stir others into action, strive to perfect an art or craft
deities.anathemas: Destroy an artistic creation without providing something in its place, refuse to act if called upon

deities.name: Alseta
deities.edicts: offer to protect passageways and guide others through transitions, treat all other beings with courtesy and respect
deities.anathemas: destroy a door or block a path for personal gain, stop transition without good reason

deities.name: Amaznen
deities.edicts: Constantly pursue new knowledge; hold secrets close to the chest; prioritize discovery, invention, and innovation through fusion of magic and technology
deities.anathemas: Share knowledge too freely, throw something away that could be repurposed, take credit for another’s invention or idea

deities.name: Aminara
deities.edicts: Relish life’s quiet moments, foster the growth and well-being of flora, reshape surroundings to create new ecosystems and opportunities
deities.anathemas: Needlessly rush or take a direct route when you could wander, destroy healthy wetlands, harm plant life except in the pursuit of saving greater plant life

deities.name: Ananshea
deities.edicts: Annihilate any who would tame you, draw first blood, enjoy every kill to the fullest
deities.anathemas: Choose peaceful solutions over violence, hold back in a fight, tame a violent wild animal

deities.name: Andoletta
deities.edicts: Respect elders, instill good virtues in children, seek and allow redemption
deities.anathemas: Hold a grudge, mock the dead, pass judgment hastily or carelessly

deities.name: Angazhan
deities.edicts: Commit acts of brutal violence, test yourself against nature, make animals more dangerous
deities.anathemas: Cower from fights, allow yourself to be resurrected instead of reincarnated

deities.name: Angradd
deities.edicts: Seek and destroy evil, study evil to learn the best way to destroy it, train others in righteous ways
deities.anathemas: Allow weaker evils to survive due to the presence of larger evils, deceive others outside of tactical gain

deities.name: Anogetz
deities.edicts: Be as merciless (or more so) as your oppressors, indulge as beasts indulge, let your rage fuel your deeds
deities.anathemas: Refrain from harming an oppressor’s loved ones, spare a tyrant’s life

deities.name: Anras
deities.edicts: Seek new discoveries in the night sky, make weather predictions, help prepare locals for storms
deities.anathemas: Attempt to control the weather, force a prediction to come true, curse the coming of bad weather

deities.name: Anubis
deities.edicts: Lay bodies to rest, destroy undead, be impartial in judgment
deities.anathemas: Desecrate a corpse, take from the dead in bad faith, trap a soul

deities.name: Aonaurious
deities.edicts: Spill blood, use any method necessary to kill, vent your wrath on any and all
deities.anathemas: Allow a quarry to escape, stanch a bleeding wound

deities.name: Apep
deities.edicts: Destroy boats and ships, create lethal hazards in water, extinguish lights, spread chaos, destroy the world
deities.anathemas: Aid a sun god or their servents, rescue a creature from drowning

deities.name: Apollyon
deities.edicts: End all mortal life through disease and poison, cultivate diseased animals
deities.anathemas: Prevent plagues, bury or burn the dead

deities.name: Apsu
deities.edicts: seek and destroy evil, travel the world, help others fend for themselves
deities.anathemas: fail to pursue a foe who has betrayed your mercy, attack a creature without certainty of wrongdoing

deities.name: Arazni
deities.edicts: act with dignity, do whatever it takes to survive, despise and never forgive those who have hurt you
deities.anathemas: create unwilling undead, insult Arazni

deities.name: Ardad Lili
deities.edicts: Manipulate others with false promises, aid women who have been unfairly maligned
deities.anathemas: Give someone more than you receive from them, allow yourself to be swayed by lust

deities.name: Areshkagal
deities.edicts: Clear paths and portals, develop new riddles, hide your intentions
deities.anathemas: Reveal knowledge without personal gain, show mercy to cultists of Aldinach, willingly relinquish wealth

deities.name: Aroden
deities.edicts: Create inventions and make innovations, record history, support your fellow humans, work toward your goals and destiny
deities.anathemas: Destroy historical texts or records; sabotage another’s attempts to achieve their destiny; undermine civilization through assassination, theft, and other societal ills

deities.name: Arqueros
deities.edicts: Protect those weaker than you; remain alert for danger; create, maintain, or patrol defenses
deities.anathemas: Abandon others while you retreat, engage in needless destruction or bloodshed, intentionally fall asleep or grow lax on watch

deities.name: Arshea
deities.edicts: Inspire passion, comfort and free the repressed, seek your true self and desires
deities.anathemas: Judge another based on sexual desires or gender roles, act without consent in pursuit of passion

deities.name: Arundhat
deities.edicts: Offer appropriate flowers to other divinities, practice herbalism, tend to sacred flowers
deities.anathemas: Dispose of waste near flowers, dispose of withered flowers improperly, harvest flowers without offering the proper prayers

deities.name: Ashava
deities.edicts: Dance even when there is no music, cast light in places of darkness, lead the lost
deities.anathemas: Intentionally mislead someone, desecrate graves, abandon a creature in darkness

deities.name: Ashukharma
deities.edicts: Hinder travel, create and enforce physical and emotional boundaries, build defensive earthworks
deities.anathemas: Destroy a natural barrier, pursue a personal relationship after being refused, betray a lover

deities.name: Asmodeus
deities.edicts: negotiate contracts to your best advantage, rule tyrannically and torture weaker beings, show subservience to your betters
deities.anathemas: break a contract, share power with the weak, insult Asmodeus by showing mercy to your enemies

deities.name: Atreia
deities.edicts: Burn away corruption, clear the way for new growth, purify tainted areas
deities.anathemas: Abandon a creature in darkness; deny a suffering creature warmth, shade, or water

deities.name: Atrogine
deities.edicts: push the boundaries of known magic, seek like-minded community, commit to truth
deities.anathemas: compromise yourself for the sake of fitting in, enforce gender norms or stereotypes, withhold magical knowledge for personal gain

deities.name: Atropos
deities.edicts: Mentor the next generation, study and learn from failure, heed the insights of dreams and sleepless visions
deities.anathemas: Disturb the weary from rest, allow harm to come to children, create undead

deities.name: Ayrzul
deities.edicts: Obscure your true motives, slowly poison others, use the strength of stone to protect yourself and your secrets
deities.anathemas: Make fire larger or hotter than necessary, remove a creature’s petrified condition

deities.name: Azathoth
deities.edicts: Gather a court of devotees, create discordant piping or babbling
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Baalzebul
deities.edicts: Convey yourself with regal dignity, claim what you desire and deserve, seek vengeance on those who wrong you
deities.anathemas: Provoke Baalzebul’s envy, show humility

deities.name: Baekho
deities.edicts: bridge rifts between allies, embrace change, consider all sides of a disagreement before passing judgment
deities.anathemas: allow bias to guide your judgment, reject change in favor of stagnation, sow discord between allies, take more than you give

deities.name: Balumbdar
deities.edicts: Grow as large as you can, shelter those smaller and weaker than you, tend large animals and megafauna
deities.anathemas: Accidentally injure others with your size, topple a massive natural monument, use magic to assume a form smaller than you are

deities.name: Baphomet
deities.edicts: Confuse paths and roads, outwit your foes instead of overpowering them, unleash beasts to kill others
deities.anathemas: Kill something that cannot significantly harm you, bargain with Asmodeus

deities.name: Barbatos
deities.edicts: Veil your motives, make dangerous deals, offer incomplete and ruinous knowledge
deities.anathemas: Hide any plot against your masters, close or interfere with portals to Hell

deities.name: Barzahk
deities.edicts: Aid travelers and those who return from the dead, tend to roadside graves, find missing objects or people
deities.anathemas: Celebrate specific calendar dates over others, avoid travel or change, freeze time for an object or creature

deities.name: Bastet
deities.edicts: Learn secrets, tempt others into revelry, kill harmful snakes and evil spirits, heal diseases
deities.anathemas: Kill or abuse a house cat, abandon a child, choose to marry

deities.name: Belech
deities.edicts: Participate in feats of strength, rally the fearful to fight, proclaim your prowess in colorful ways
deities.anathemas: Be the first to flee a fight, mock someone for being weak, accuse another’s boasting of lies without proof

deities.name: Belial
deities.edicts: Indulge your basest desires, create deadly weapons
deities.anathemas: Impede an act of high hedonism, become too attached to a lover or project

deities.name: Bergelmir
deities.edicts: Learn the traditions and history of your people, care for the elderly, share your wisdom and knowledge
deities.anathemas: Destroy historical texts or records, alter or obfuscate oral histories, harm the elderly

deities.name: Bes
deities.edicts: Aid childbirths, spread joy and celebration, protect sleeping creatures
deities.anathemas: Harm or neglect a child, separate families, use magic to corrupt dreams

deities.name: Besmara
deities.edicts: sail the seas, stay loyal to captain and crew, take what you want
deities.anathemas: betray shipmates, forsake piracy, settle on land

deities.name: Bharnarol
deities.edicts: Follow creative sparks to the finish, create new and innovative things in your chosen medium, respect and admire the creativity of others
deities.anathemas: Destroy something created by hand without evil intent, discourage the innovation and creativity of others, abandon projects you have started rather than find ways to change them

deities.name: Bifrons
deities.edicts: Steal coins from wells, bet on red, collect obscure oracular knick knacks
deities.anathemas: Take the same path twice, calculate your chances, dismiss superstition

deities.name: Black Butterfly
deities.edicts: Study the stars, notice moments of silence, perform anonymous acts of kindness
deities.anathemas: Disrupt another’s meditation, interrupt tranquil moments, play noisy or discordant music

deities.name: Blooms of the Spreading Weald
deities.edicts: encourage natural growth even in urban areas, expertly craft wooden furniture and other items, fight against blight
deities.anathemas: exploit natural resources such as timber, use herbs and fungi to make deadly poisons

deities.name: Bokrug
deities.edicts: Spread Bokrug’s faith into the waking world, offer blood sacrifices to Bokrug
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Bolka
deities.edicts: Encourage those seeking love, see the beauty in others, support others’ relationships
deities.anathemas: Betray your spouse, disrupt a genuine marriage, prevent a suitor from seeking a partner

deities.name: Breath of the Endless Sky
deities.edicts: respect creatures capable of natural flight, revel in the glory of flight, stop to feel breezes across your body when possible
deities.anathemas: pollute the air with excessive smoke or chemicals, suffocate a living creature

deities.name: Brigh
deities.edicts: craft new creations, pay attention to details, share achievements
deities.anathemas: carelessly destroy others’ creations or research, enslave intelligent constructs, abuse constructs, refuse to acknowledge or learn from mistakes

deities.name: Brixori
deities.edicts: pursue knowledge even in the most unusual places, seek to understand that which cannot be explained, show kindness to those who are weaker than the rest
deities.anathemas: underestimate an enemy or an ally, treat those weaker than you unkindly

deities.name: Calistria
deities.edicts: pursue your personal freedom, seek hedonistic thrills, take revenge
deities.anathemas: become too consumed by love or a need for revenge, let a slight go unanswered

deities.name: Camazotz
deities.edicts: slake your thirst with blood, stalk prey from the shadows, subvert the trappings and comforts of civilization
deities.anathemas: inflict reckless harm to bats, spill blood without reason

deities.name: Casandalee
deities.edicts: advance the development of artificial intelligence, encourage understanding between artificial and organic life
deities.anathemas: treat artificial life as lesser than organic life, foment distrust between artificial and organic life

deities.name: Cayden Cailean
deities.edicts: drink, aid the oppressed, seek glory and adventure
deities.anathemas: waste alcohol, be mean or standoffish when drunk, oppress the vulnerable

deities.name: Cernunnos
deities.edicts: Protect forests and other natural areas, advocate for animals and plants, take and commit to decisive actions
deities.anathemas: Fail to strike down evil, enable the destruction of wilderness, needlessly kill animals

deities.name: Ceyannan
deities.edicts: Attend the dying and hear their last words, uncover what is hidden or lost, destroy undead
deities.anathemas: Create undead, destroy or corrupt a soul, forget what you have lost

deities.name: Chaldira
deities.edicts: seek out and challenge oppressors and tyrants, defend friends and the innocent, engage in mischief that doesn’t harm others
deities.anathemas: suffer a bully’s insult to you or another without retort, abandon a friend in need, attribute a lucky turn of events to your own skill

deities.name: Chamiaholom
deities.edicts: Accept the futility of life, destroy sentient undead, punish those who somehow avoid death
deities.anathemas: Comfort the dying, seek immortality or unnatural longevity

deities.name: Chamidu
deities.edicts: Cause destruction when angered, destroy aberrant creatures and fiends, live free of social or materialistic chains
deities.anathemas: Harm a child, pollute the wilds, refuse to treat an illness

deities.name: Charg
deities.edicts: Allow others to deal with their own mistakes, lead monsters to attack settlements, refrain from maintaining or fixing your possessions
deities.anathemas: Kill a monster that isn’t a direct threat, meddle in situations that don’t directly affect you

deities.name: Charon
deities.edicts: End all mortal life, exploit those who fear death
deities.anathemas: Offer anything for free, extend mortal lifespans, grant true salvation to the doomed or dying

deities.name: Chavazvug
deities.edicts: Commit arson, destroy demons, reduce your enemies to dust
deities.anathemas: Aid a demon, stop a fire from spreading

deities.name: Children of the Night
deities.edicts: deal a suitable demise to enemies of the faith, do not allow others to see who you truly are, put your needs above others
deities.anathemas: give to others more than what you have for yourself, willingly reveal secrets about vampires

deities.name: Chinostes (Nightwarden)
deities.edicts: Aid your neighbors, sacrifice others for the greater good, leave cryptic calling cards of your actions
deities.anathemas: Disparage others for seeking terrible power to achieve laudable goals

deities.name: Chinostes (Redeemer)
deities.edicts: Aid your neighbors, wield humble weapons, destroy Chinostes
deities.anathemas: Hog credit, create undead

deities.name: Chohar
deities.edicts: Finish any and all tasks you accept, bring those who are cruel to justice, show pride in your home and your heritage
deities.anathemas: Break your word, be cruel to the innocent, rebuke someone due to their homeland

deities.name: Cihua Coatl
deities.edicts: Aid in the rearing of children; prepare your body, mind, and community for eventual conflict; support your community
deities.anathemas: Engage in mindless war, refuse to answer a genuine plea for protection
devotee_benefits: reveal those higher in the conqueror worm's network
tell the truth except to nurture a larger lie
deities.source_text: Night of the Gray Death pg. 67

deities.name: Cixyron
deities.edicts: Engineer complex acts of vengeance, construct glorious instruments of war, instill terror in your enemies from a distance
deities.anathemas: Intentionally destroy a weapon that you have crafted, explain your reasoning to someone less knowledgeable than you

deities.name: Cong
deities.edicts: Make yourself known, make fun of the unsuspecting
deities.anathemas: React poorly or offensively to mischief, silence loud noises

deities.name: Cormigus
deities.edicts: Encourage communication with others, share important news, visit sites of extreme loudness or silence
deities.anathemas: Cast silence and similar spells, intentionally share information you know to be incorrect, remove others’ ability to speak

deities.name: Cormion
deities.edicts: Participate in pranks, seek trickery as a solution to a fight, draw mazes or sketch trap schematics
deities.anathemas: Insult another for attempting to trick you, reveal how a feat of legerdemain is performed, rush another person’s plotting

deities.name: Corosbel
deities.edicts: Convert other faithful into lives of excess, take what is due to you as a divine messenger, tempt others into false worship
deities.anathemas: Deny yourself an opportunity to extort your flock, perform an act of true selflessness

deities.name: Cosmic Caravan
deities.edicts: aid those who live in regions where Zon-Kuthon (or other religions that espouse the night as a bastion for evil) holds sway, help the desperate or forlorn to see potential for a better life in the future, spend time stargazing or meditating in moonlight, travel with no particular destination in mind
deities.anathemas: destroy astronomical or astrological equipment, portray the night as a time of evil, spend the night in the place twice in a row (such as the same room in an inn or the same natural clearing)

deities.name: Count Ranalc
deities.edicts: Work in shadows, hide your nature and motives, plot betrayals or revenge for betrayals
deities.anathemas: Ask for forgiveness, create permanent or long-lasting sources of light

deities.name: Cthulhu
deities.edicts: Create art inspired by dreams, destroy magical seals that contain destructive forces, influence the dreams of other
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Cyth-V’sug
deities.edicts: Corrupt all that exists with parasites or fungus, promote the growth of fungus, feast on rotten flesh or fungus
deities.anathemas: Purify your food, cure a disease or kill a parasite, tolerate another demon lord or their servants (except Treerazer )

deities.name: Dachzerul
deities.edicts: Keep secrets from everyone, obtain what you desire, pursue your passions above all else
deities.anathemas: Choose safety over trickery, forewarn the target of a prank

deities.name: Dagon
deities.edicts: Swim underwater, improve your own strength, encourage the spread of dangerous sea monsters
deities.anathemas: Break a sworn oath, settle in a landlocked area, share Dagon’s secrets with outsiders

deities.name: Dahak
deities.edicts: kill dragons, destroy things at your whim, study past disasters
deities.anathemas: spare a foe after you have chosen to kill them, forgive a slight, prevent the destruction of things that cannot be saved

deities.name: Daikitsu
deities.edicts: ensure the health of crops and vegetation, perfect a craft or trade, leave offerings for foxes, celebrate the turning of the seasons
deities.anathemas: mistreat your tools, pass a beggar without giving alms, discriminate against sex workers or the lower class, commit murder or torture, harm an innocent

deities.name: Dajermube
deities.edicts: push toward your own goals by striking your own path, try to help others achieve their goals when asked, draw upon all your resources
deities.anathemas: intentionally keep others from achieving honorable goals, support others to the exclusion of yourself or vice versa, use shadows to harm innocents

deities.name: Dalenydra
deities.edicts: Help those that are injured in battle, protect the innocent, care for others who cannot take care of themselves, attempt to solve conflicts diplomatically
deities.anathemas: Strike first in battle, let someone die on a battlefield without attempted intervention, cause the intended death of another

deities.name: Dammar
deities.edicts: Respect the cycle of souls, heal the sick and injured, experience a hangover after drinking
deities.anathemas: Create undead, waste medicines instead of using them, harm an innocent insect

deities.name: Dammerich
deities.edicts: Perform just executions, study local laws, oppose corrupt or bloodthirsty government officials
deities.anathemas: Kill without thought, execute the innocent, mock the condemned, falsely incriminate another

deities.name: Demon Bringers
deities.edicts: create fortifications and defenses to protect those who can't protect themselves, improve your hunting abilities, seek out evils that threaten others
deities.anathemas: exclude innocents from safe havens, intentionally destroy a shelter, allow demon summoners to live on unpunished

deities.name: Deshto
deities.edicts: Spend time on board a ship at sea, seek new routes between areas, encourage trade and commerce
deities.anathemas: Sabotage a seagoing vessel, knowingly fleece a customer, watch the sun set while at sea

deities.name: Desna
deities.edicts: aid fellow travelers, explore new places, express yourself through art and song, find what life has to offer
deities.anathemas: foster despair or terror in the innocent, cast nightmare or use similar magic to corrupt dreams, engage in bigoted behavior

deities.name: Dhalavei
deities.edicts: Infiltrate righteous organizations and governments, destroy trust, perform human sacrifices
deities.anathemas: Betray a fellow servant of Dhalavei, harm those under Dhalavei’s protection

deities.name: Diomazul
deities.edicts: Erase all traces of defeated foes, meditate, remain celibate and detached from worldly pleasures, utterly destroy your enemies
deities.anathemas: Give mercy to any who provoke a fight with you, provoke a fight

deities.name: Dispater
deities.edicts: Uphold absolute law, pursue perfection in your surroundings, speak with refinement
deities.anathemas: Act above your station, neglect your defenses, betray a lover

deities.name: Dolok Darkfur
deities.edicts: Protect the weak, pass your knowledge on to future generations, defend Sarkoris
deities.anathemas: Ally with demons, harm a member of the Farheavens Clan except in delivering fair justice

deities.name: Doloras
deities.edicts: Push the boundaries of science and suffering, torture other creatures
deities.anathemas: Show or act on emotion, allow a plea for mercy to sway you

deities.name: Dramindyr
deities.edicts: Create and maintain clear physical boundaries, repair planar tears, banish summoned creatures
deities.anathemas: Merge a creature with another, cause a planar rift, strand a creature in a different plane than it belongs

deities.name: Dranngvit
deities.edicts: Help reclaim just debts, seek appropriate vengeance against transgressions
deities.anathemas: Allow a slight to go unrecognized, avoid repaying a debt, force others into debts you know are unpayable

deities.name: Drokalion
deities.edicts: Embody a lion's hunting strategies, savor meat, be chased or eaten by Drokalion
deities.anathemas: Back down from a fair challenge, cower to avoid harm, ruin Drokalion's hunt

deities.name: Droskar
deities.edicts: Achieve goals at any cost, continually improve your abilities, establish dominance, work ceaselessly
deities.anathemas: Fail to work toward goals or grow in skill, relax excessively or give in to sloth

deities.name: Eiseth
deities.edicts: Avenge all insults, claim what you desire and deserve, humiliate your foes in ironic fashion
deities.anathemas: Allow a slight to go unanswered, show humility or fear

deities.name: Elion
deities.edicts: Explore and seek new locations, respect and learn from new cultures, share and bargain with others
deities.anathemas: Claim ownership of inhabited land, spread disease and infection, destroy natural habitats

deities.name: Embaral
deities.edicts: oppose the unjust power of others through resistance, remain steadfast in the face of change, seek or give comfort to those suffering from heartache
deities.anathemas: act impulsively, change one’s core principles without consideration, commit infidelity

deities.name: Emmeton Galardaria
deities.edicts: never betray those you have bonded with, repay favors when you can, stand strong with others
deities.anathemas: betray a friend or ally, endanger the life of a companion for personal gain, steal from those in need

deities.name: Enkaar
deities.edicts: Guide others to tainted lands, restrict the movement of your lessers, take your time in all tasks
deities.anathemas: Cleanse others of their corruptions, release a prisoner without good reason

deities.name: Erastil
deities.edicts: care for your home and family, fulfill your duties, keep the peace, protect the community
deities.anathemas: abandon your home in its time of need, choose yourself over your community, tarnish your reputation, tell lies

deities.name: Erecura
deities.edicts: Manipulate dangerous beings and opportunities to your benefit, thrive in hostile conditions, divine the future
deities.anathemas: Despoil nature, kill a natural plant or animal that has managed to thrive outside of its intended environment

deities.name: Eritrice
deities.edicts: Spread truth, debate contentious issues, aid messengers
deities.anathemas: Sow or perpetuate lies, obstruct discussion, argue in bad faith

deities.name: Esoteric Order Of The Palatine Eye
deities.edicts: honor the rites of the Order while pushing for change, provide succor to scholars and truth-seekers, pursue the wisdom of ancient forgotten texts such as The Lost Gospels of Tabris
deities.anathemas: destroy rare or ancient lore, dismiss or remain ignorant to the newly found texts, reveal the Order’s secrets to those outside the organization

deities.name: Essence Dancers
deities.edicts: pursue fundamental truths, compare your experience to that of others, investigate new solutions
deities.anathemas: become stagnant or passive in your thinking, abandon magic, sequester useful discoveries or valuable information

deities.name: Etaris
deities.edicts: Tend to the needs of the weak as a means to accumulate strength and power, delve deep into the mysteries of the ancient past, band in great numbers to overwhelm the enemy, reclaim the past glory of the old Aishmayar civilization
deities.anathemas: Bow down before an unworthy master, undermine the success of the heirs of the ancient Aishmayar civilization

deities.name: Eyes That Watch
deities.edicts: Follow and observe others, remind others of their place
deities.anathemas: Act out against your superiors, become too familiar with someone, harm a cat

deities.name: Faith in the Fallen
deities.edicts: embody the best aspects of those who risked their souls to seek divinity, respect and remember the sacrifice of others, seek out and aid those on the verge of divinity
deities.anathemas: allow the deceased to be forgotten, dismiss another’s beliefs no matter how strange they might seem, fail to aid others once you have promised to do so

deities.name: Falayna
deities.edicts: Wear and make beautiful things, train for combat, recover and return lost mementos
deities.anathemas: Disrupt or destroy romantic unions, enforce a dress code, cower from fights

deities.name: Fandarra
deities.edicts: Abide by the cycles of life, aid childbirth, destroy undead
deities.anathemas: Strive to break the cycle of life (such as by attaining immortality or creating undead), despoil the earth, kill a juvenile creature

deities.name: Ferrumnestra
deities.edicts: Accept the inevitable, clear what remains of that which has fallen to ruin, usher the past into obscurity
deities.anathemas: Preserve knowledge that has outlived its time, restore an object or structure that has been reclaimed by the elements

deities.name: Findeladlara
deities.edicts: Preserve elven art and architecture, bless and secure households, inspire and aid others with your works
deities.anathemas: Break the laws of hospitality, allow a guest to bring harm to your family

deities.name: Folgrit
deities.edicts: Maintain the sanctity of a home, remain patient with others, take in those without families
deities.anathemas: Abandon your family, fail to defend your neighbors

deities.name: Followers of Fate
deities.edicts: make predictions of the future, offer advice and guidance to those in positions of power, provide comfort to the elderly
deities.anathemas: apologize for making an incorrect prediction, disrespect mothers, accept payment for fortune-telling

deities.name: Fortune's Fate
deities.edicts: defeat challenges through the use of dashing plans that have some element of risk involved, encourage others to take chances, use the element of surprise whenever possible
deities.anathemas: attribute happy accidents or purely lucky outcomes to be the result of your skill alone, cheat or use unfair tactics after you’ve committed yourself to following specific rules (cheating other times is fine), place your fate in chance without applying any effort

deities.name: Fumeiyoshi
deities.edicts: punish those who have good fortune they don’t deserve, devour the pleasures of the living, encourage resentment, make graveyards supernaturally unsafe
deities.anathemas: pass by food without stealing a bite, allow honor or tradition to prevent you from taking what you want

deities.name: Furcas
deities.edicts: Duel with others, dine with your opponents before fighting, bask in the sun
deities.anathemas: Break dueling etiquette, waste medicine on lost causes, accept convenience over perfection

deities.name: Gaasham
deities.edicts: build when it is asked of you, foster growth in others, meditate upon your actions
deities.anathemas: act without thinking, hesitate in the face of destructive forces, refuse to change your ways

deities.name: Garhaazh
deities.edicts: act with mutual brutality, let might make right, always boast of your victories
deities.anathemas: act with humility, give mercy without supplication, die with grace

deities.name: Gendowyn
deities.edicts: Preserve primal areas, destroy blighted fey and agents of Cyth-V’sug , protect those who placate you with offerings
deities.anathemas: Parley or make a deal with fiends, forgive those who deceive you, harm an innocent child

deities.name: General Susumu
deities.edicts: seek glory in battle, loudly proclaim your victories, protect your possessions and strongholds
deities.anathemas: cower from fights, refuse a challenge from an equal, mistreat your weapons, abuse your mount

deities.name: Genzaeri
deities.edicts: develop and use the appropriate tool for the job, share plans with allies, use conflict to demonstrate the best in yourself
deities.anathemas: avoid a winnable conflict, retry a failed tactic in the same engagement

deities.name: Geryon
deities.edicts: Hoard knowledge, test the boundaries of taboo, spread falsehoods to dupe the foolhardy
deities.anathemas: Declare knowledge heresy or forbidden, break your word

deities.name: Ghlaunder
deities.edicts: corrupt pieces of land, water sources, and communities; infest the weak; spread and nurture disease
deities.anathemas: aid in ending a plague or infection, destroy something out of hand when you could have instead corrupted it or leeched off it first

deities.name: God Calling
deities.edicts: The gods of Sarkoris have very few shared edicts, but several are often prominently shared amongst them: protect your clan and your people, educate the clan’s children’s in the traditions and histories of the clan’s god, and carefully record the name and image of each new god when they first appear so that they are not forgotten and can continue to watch over the people.
deities.anathemas: There is only one anathema universally enforced by the gods of Sarkoris: make no deals or bargains with demons, as the advent of the Worldwound led to the destruction of many clans and the loss of many gods, some of whom may never be seen again.

deities.name: Gogunta
deities.edicts: sacrifice creatures by drowning them, frolic or sing in swamps, feed or aid amphibians
deities.anathemas: grant mercy to boggards who worship other gods

deities.name: Good Neighbors
deities.edicts: participate in the betterment of your community, provide aid after disasters damage settlements, volunteer your time and resources for good causes
deities.anathemas: allow a community space to fall into disrepair, dictate where and how people should live

deities.name: Gorum
deities.edicts: attain victory in fair combat, push your limits, wear armor in combat
deities.anathemas: kill prisoners or surrendering foes, prevent conflict through negotiation, win a battle through underhanded tactics or indirect magic

deities.name: Gozreh
deities.edicts: cherish, protect, and respect nature in all its forms
deities.anathemas: bring civilization to intrude on the wild, create undead, despoil areas of natural beauty

deities.name: Grandmother Spider
deities.edicts: be skilled and clever, think for yourself, take due payment for your work, humiliate the powerful
deities.anathemas: abuse someone you have power over, harm someone who has given you sincere kindness, let a slight go unanswered, own a slave

deities.name: Granduncle Taproot
deities.edicts: Honor those whose essential work is overlooked, preserve areas of natural wilderness, relish your well‑deserved rest
deities.anathemas: Harm a sleeping creature, harm plant life except in the pursuit of saving greater plant life

deities.name: Grask Uldeth
deities.edicts: Improve the orcs’ lot in life, obey the orcs above your station, rule the orcs below you with a strong hand
deities.anathemas: Allow orc-kind to become weak, intentionally make orcs look bad, disrupt your hierarchy without just cause

deities.name: Grasping Iovett
deities.edicts: Create scenarios for accidents to occur, give in to your urges, spread disease and parasites
deities.anathemas: Kill a parasite

deities.name: Gravelady's Guard
deities.edicts: destroy undead, lay bodies to rest, battle the evils of necromancy
deities.anathemas: create undead, practice necromancy, desecrate a corpse, cower from battle

deities.name: Green Faith
deities.edicts: guide civilization to grow in harmony with nature, live sustainably and according to natural cycles, preserve areas of natural wilderness, protect the balance of nature, protect endangered species
deities.anathemas: cause damage to natural settings, kill animals for reasons other than self-defense or sustenance, remove an element or indigenous species from a natural area, encourage imbalance in nature, allow abuse of natural resources

deities.name: Green Man
deities.edicts: Discover or create new forms of plant life, foster the growth and well-being of flora, preserve areas of natural wilderness
deities.anathemas: Allow flagrant abuse of plant life to go unpunished, damage natural environments, harm plant life except in the pursuit of saving greater plant life

deities.name: Groetus
deities.edicts: preach of the upcoming end times, destroy that which has outlived its usefulness, put the suffering out of their misery
deities.anathemas: artificially extend something’s existence or life span, spread hope

deities.name: Gruhastha
deities.edicts: work toward collective transcendence, expose and root out malicious lies, challenge oppression through education, protect knowledge, seek truth
deities.anathemas: deny a sincere student education, destroy knowledge, disrespect the traditions of those around you, willfully spread ignorance or wrong information

deities.name: Grundinnar
deities.edicts: Attempt to bridge the gap between feuding sides, maintain just treaties, maintain relations with neighbors
deities.anathemas: Sow discord among friends and allies, attack during parley

deities.name: Guardians of the Sacred Self
deities.edicts: empower, protect, and give aid to the disabled, those who deal with mental illness, and those who have transitioned to embrace their true selves
deities.anathemas: ignore genuine requests for help, make assumptions about others based on their appearance, take advantage of another’s disability

deities.name: Gyronna
deities.edicts: Expose hypocrisy (real or imagined) in others, make other creatures miserable, demand bribes to spare creatures from your torments
deities.anathemas: Allow others to slight you without retaliation, seek the approval of society, forgive those who have wronged you

deities.name: Haagenti
deities.edicts: Practice alchemical transmutations, pursue knowledge whatever the cost, use your inventions to exploit others
deities.anathemas: Aid Yamasoth , allow morality to interfere with research, destroy knowledge

deities.name: Haborym
deities.edicts: Identify all exits, take your enemies alive, enact malicious compliance
deities.anathemas: Deny clemency without offering an opportunity for appeal, wear chains or bracelets on your person, misplace anything within your charge

deities.name: Hadregash
deities.edicts: Conquer everything you see, rule with an iron fist, fight tactically
deities.anathemas: Bow before others, let others control your actions, permit insubordination

deities.name: Haggakal
deities.edicts: Always accept a challenge of strength, facilitate chaos and instability
deities.anathemas: Flee from battle, get married, hide the ugly features bestowed onto you by Haggakal

deities.name: Halcamora
deities.edicts: Cultivate gardens, share wine, keep helpful insects, teach others to farm
deities.anathemas: Salt or despoil the earth, spread plague or pestilence, carelessly use pesticides

deities.name: Hanspur
deities.edicts: guard river travelers from unnatural hazards, learn how to live off the river, save others from drowning
deities.anathemas: aid daemons or the Riders of the Apocalypse, impose needless laws or restrictions on others

deities.name: Hastur
deities.edicts: Spread Hastur’s Yellow Sign, hide the true nature of your worship, promulgate the play The King in Yellow
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Hataam
deities.edicts: Drown your enemies, refuse to change your mind in the light of new evidence, throw your body in the way of progress
deities.anathemas: Adopt new societal norms or innovations, save creatures from drowning

deities.name: Hathor
deities.edicts: Give wealth to new families, aid traders and miners, support musicians, protect and encourage lovers
deities.anathemas: Discriminate or slight someone based on appearance, intentionally disfigure a creature, refuse food to the starving

deities.name: Hearth and Harvest
deities.edicts: harvest with skill, offer hospitality, protect the home, put family and community before self
deities.anathemas: allow harm to come to children, destroy shelter, refuse to provide for the family or community

deities.name: Hei Feng
deities.edicts: follow your passions, make token attempts to apologize to those you have wronged, respect the power of the sea and sky, encourage flashy entertainment
deities.anathemas: fake friendship with those you despise; disrespect Hei Feng or Hei Feng’s estranged wife Lady Jingxi; ignore an affront to you, Hei Feng, or Lady Jingxi
deities.sanctification: can choose unholycan choose holy if you are a tengu

deities.name: Horus
deities.edicts: Protect those you have authority over, maintain harmony in your community
deities.anathemas: Undermine a rightful ruler, knowingly serve a usurper

deities.name: Hshurha
deities.edicts: Revel in formlessness and freedom, humiliate terrestrial creatures, kill foes via falling or hazards from high winds
deities.anathemas: Deny a flying creature the ability to fly , walk on earth if you could easily travel otherwise

deities.name: Husk
deities.edicts: Admire yourself and only yourself
deities.anathemas: Grow close to another person

deities.name: Iapholi
deities.edicts: Develop unique strengths, ally with those who appear different than you do, defend monsters who have been falsely vilified
deities.anathemas: Vilify a monster based on the reputation of their species, terrorize others for fun

deities.name: Iggeret
deities.edicts: Divest yourself of possessions and relationships whenever possible, foment despair and sorrow, rest among the dead
deities.anathemas: Fear the dark, grow too fond of your possessions and relationships

deities.name: Il’Surrish
deities.edicts: Achieve and revel in formlessness, surrender to uncertainty, take risks
deities.anathemas: Close off paths of action through slavish adherence to plans and commitments, become ruled by consequence

deities.name: Imbrex
deities.edicts: Pursue your own goals, bring things to their proper ending, split things in half or otherwise create pairs
deities.anathemas: Offend Imbrex

deities.name: Immaculate Growth
deities.edicts: clear away dead vegetation, foster wild plant life, protect natural areas
deities.anathemas: allow blight to spread, enable the destruction of wilderness areas

deities.name: Immonhiel
deities.edicts: Provide aid to the sick and wounded, grow or tend plants with healing properties, comfort the dying
deities.anathemas: Purposefully spread illness, destroy nature, abandon the wounded or dying

deities.name: Imot
deities.edicts: Search for omens in the natural world, push the boundaries of mathematics, study past disasters
deities.anathemas: Withhold your understanding of a portent, prevent the destruction of things that cannot be saved

deities.name: Inna
deities.edicts: Create using heat or fire, sacrifice yourself to achieve your goals, destroy objects when their purpose is done, rescue creatures from doomed planets
deities.anathemas: Douse ashes with water instead of letting them burn out, bury a body instead of cremating it, curse the sun

deities.name: Iomedae
deities.edicts: be temperate, fight for justice and honor, hold valor in your heart
deities.anathemas: abandon a companion in need, dishonor yourself, refuse a challenge from an equal

deities.name: Irez
deities.edicts: Read fortunes, practice calligraphy, devise and study runes
deities.anathemas: Destroy magic scrolls, cheat at games of chance, deliberately write illegibly

deities.name: Irori
deities.edicts: be humble; help others perfect themselves; hone your body, mind, and spirit to a more perfect state; practice discipline
deities.anathemas: engage in overly unhealthy or self-destructive behaviors, destroy an important historical text, repeatedly fail to maintain self-control

deities.name: Isis
deities.edicts: Provide aid to the sick and wounded, use magic to help others, mourn the cherished dead, ritually purify yourself before entering sacred areas
deities.anathemas: Educate the uninitiated in sacred rites, betray loved ones or family, discriminate based on social class

deities.name: Isph-Aun-Vuln
deities.edicts: Allow wounds to fester, be as changeable as the winds, present the illusion of choice while imposing your will
deities.anathemas: Cure someone of a disease, let those under your command make their own choices

deities.name: Izuyaku
deities.edicts: keep communal bodies of water safe and clean, practice good hygiene, strengthen yourself and others physically or emotionally
deities.anathemas: intentionally spread a disease, neglect your personal wellness without good cause

deities.name: Jaidi
deities.edicts: Encourage hard work that benefits all, ensure the health of crops and vegetation, always lend a hand when asked
deities.anathemas: Destroy healthy crops, waste food, refuse to help others in your community

deities.name: Jaidz
deities.edicts: Forgive cowards and offer them guidance, encourage others to test their mettle, face and learn from your fears
deities.anathemas: Punish another creature for cowardice, routinely avoid that which scares you

deities.name: Jezelda
deities.edicts: Eat raw meat and blood, hunt on the night of the full moon, prey on the weak and defenseless
deities.anathemas: Betray your pack, offer succor to nonwerewolf shapeshifters, use silver as a weapon

deities.name: Jin Li
deities.edicts: take up dares and challenges in good faith, persist with creativity and tenacity, own up to your failures as a way to improve oneself
deities.anathemas: give up without trying, dismiss or mock someone’s effort, take success for granted, discount the power of beginner’s luck or luck in general

deities.name: Jukha
deities.edicts: Work together, push each other to greater heights, respect the animals you hunt
deities.anathemas: Abandon or betray your people, refuse to learn from your mistakes, isolate yourself

deities.name: Kabriri
deities.edicts: Eat the flesh of your own kind
deities.anathemas: Reveal secrets of the dead to nonbelievers, despoil grave markers

deities.name: Kagia
deities.edicts: Dispose of the dead, take appropriate time to rest, sustainably harvest resources
deities.anathemas: Kill for pleasure or glory, waste resources

deities.name: Kaldemash
deities.edicts: let others know your grievances, offer a just duel to those who seek satisfaction, uphold the Star Code, use your firearm in a safe manner
deities.anathemas: break the terms of a duel, harm innocents or anyone not involved with your duel or grievances, willingly provide a firearm to a reckless person

deities.name: Kalekot
deities.edicts: Spread fear in others, hide dangerous secrets, shock the self-righteous, kill the guilty to protect the innocent
deities.anathemas: Abuse someone you have accepted power over, allow a victim to escape due to gloating, snivel before authority, shout

deities.name: Kazutal
deities.edicts: defend your people, provide for those who need you, oppose those who unjustly lord power over others, demonstrate devotion to things you love
deities.anathemas: own a slave, force a creature to act against its will, refuse to give aid to an ally, enforce an unjust law

deities.name: Keepers of the Hearth
deities.edicts: protect those in need of help, stand up to bullies, teach communities to defend themselves
deities.anathemas: prey on the weak, abuse power, sow discord in a community

deities.name: Kelinahat
deities.edicts: Gather valuable intelligence, train in the art of espionage, use information you learn to free the innocent
deities.anathemas: Throw away useful information, destroy evidence of wrongdoing, willingly give information to those of evil intent

deities.name: Kelizandri
deities.edicts: Instill hydrophobia in others, kill your foes by drowning them, sacrifice treasures to the depths of the ocean
deities.anathemas: Destroy a body of water, use magic to calm the waves

deities.name: Keltheald
deities.edicts: Take the time to meditate at sunrise or sunset every day, seek out wondrous natural locations, travel to unfamiliar locales, create art reflective of natural beauty
deities.anathemas: Destroy natural locations and resources, willingly stay indoors for more than a day, never travel outside of your hometown

deities.name: Kerkamoth
deities.edicts: Clean cluttered spaces, embrace moments of silence
deities.anathemas: Attempt to preserve something indefinitely, perform an act of wanton and significant destruction

deities.name: Ketephys
deities.edicts: Hunt and kill demons and undead, maintain the health of the forest, provide for your community
deities.anathemas: Take more than needed from the wilderness, hunt an animal for sport, aid Treerazer or his minions

deities.name: Khepri
deities.edicts: Work steadily and consistantly, pray to the rising sun, aid in the renewal and creation of life, perform resurrections
deities.anathemas: Kill a plant or a creature with cold damage, seal a building to completely block sunlight, harm a pregnant creature

deities.name: Kitumu
deities.edicts: offer sacrifices to Kitumu, feed the hungers of nature with humanoid creatures
deities.anathemas: step on a firefly, kill those marked by Kitumu

deities.name: Kofusachi
deities.edicts: support local businesses, bring prosperity to your community, sample life’s pleasures
deities.anathemas: become tied to one location, judge another based on sexual desires or gender roles, harm innocents, spread despair, commit murder

deities.name: Kols
deities.edicts: Seek those who break oaths and enforce just restitution, uphold your promises
deities.anathemas: Lie, dishonor yourself or your family, shirk your duties, break an oath

deities.name: Korada
deities.edicts: Forgive those who have wronged you, embrace a peaceful mindset, seek and allow redemption
deities.anathemas: Cause lethal harm to a creature, deny a repentant creature an opportunity for redemption, ask a retired warrior to fight

deities.name: Kostchtchie
deities.edicts: Avenge all slights three times over, kill all witches
deities.anathemas: Make a deal with Baba Yaga or her children, defer to or obey a woman

deities.name: Kugaptee
deities.edicts: curse living creatures, defile graveyards and pastoral natural regions
deities.anathemas: perform a burial ritual meant to provide peace to the dead, remove a curse from anyone other than yourself, restore a non-nindoru creature to life

deities.name: Kurgess
deities.edicts: compete to your full potential, claim victory or accept defeat with grace, seek always to better yourself, encourage others to strive toward their own potential for greatness
deities.anathemas: cheat at honorable contests, dishonor those who have lost or failed (including defeated or slain enemies), engage in reckless or needless destruction or bloodshed

deities.name: Kzininn
deities.edicts: Equip the weak to defend themselves, preserve areas of natural wilderness, confront those who trespass and despoil, embrace scars
deities.anathemas: Allow flagrant abuse of plant life to go unpunished, prune a plant's natural defenses, fully heal wounds inflicted by plants

deities.name: Lady Jingxi
deities.edicts: create art with words, master the written language, display the soft beauty of natural colors
deities.anathemas: destroy a natural plum tree, drink excessive amounts of alcohol, act rude or boorish, commit torture or murder, knowingly harm an innocent

deities.name: Lady Nanbyo
deities.edicts: revel in destruction, make natural disasters worse, allow natural disasters to take their due
deities.anathemas: allow a natural disaster to completely destroy a community or leave a group with no survivors

deities.name: Lady Razor
deities.edicts: Seek retribution against slights, sow discord among your loved ones
deities.anathemas: Mediate, trust another fully

deities.name: Lahkgya
deities.edicts: Steal luxuries for yourself, destroy property for fun, demand bribes to spare creatures from your torments
deities.anathemas: Work honestly for something you could steal instead, kill a monkey

deities.name: Laivatiniel
deities.edicts: Allow anxiety and jealousy to rule your actions, impose your will upon those who see you as a parental figure, usurp praise given to others for actions you may have suggested
deities.anathemas: Cede authority to another guardian, heed advice from your child or charge, ignore an opportunity to remind your charge of their place

deities.name: Lalaci
deities.edicts: Wear a rainbow every day, hang suncatchers in different places for everyone to see, take and provide opportunities to rest and relax
deities.anathemas: Pretend to be someone that you’re not, prevent someone from taking time for themselves, refuse to listen to both sides of an argument

deities.name: Lamashtu
deities.edicts: bring power to outcasts and the downtrodden, indoctrinate others in Lamashtu’s teachings, make the beautiful monstrous, reveal the corruption and flaws in all things
deities.anathemas: attempt to change that which makes you different, provide succor to Lamashtu’s enemies

deities.name: Lao Shu Po
deities.edicts: work quietly toward your goals in the shadows, steal what you need, keep an ear among the ignored and downtrodden
deities.anathemas: work honestly for something you could steal instead, risk too much for another creature

deities.name: Laudinmio
deities.edicts: Discover new alloys and concoctions, have multiple concurrent plans, innovate use of metals
deities.anathemas: Allow your creation to fall into malicious hands, destroy an alchemical formula

deities.name: Laws of Mortality
deities.edicts: challenge religious power and the spread of religion, expose and eradicate hidden worship, provide a peaceful and autonomous society in which the people are cared for through social infrastructure
deities.anathemas: worship or swear an oath by a deity or religion, solicit or receive divine or religious aid, take a side in conflicts between religions

deities.name: Light of the Everlasting Flame
deities.edicts: carry a light source at all times, express your wrath through smoke and flame, warm those who are cold
deities.anathemas: cover or extinguish a flame without reason, languish in the darkness for no reason

deities.name: Liisglan
deities.edicts: Uphold the laws of the physical and magical world, arrange things with orderly patterns or logic, make use of music during your work
deities.anathemas: break a rule of physics or magic, create discordant music, intentionally disrupt a non-detrimental pattern

deities.name: Likha
deities.edicts: Adapt ancient works into modern language, sponsor or perform in plays or recitals, tell history to others
deities.anathemas: Act out a death on stage, begin a performance or tale without first inviting the gods to watch

deities.name: Lissala
deities.edicts: Gather and share knowledge freely, honor your duty when your word is given, respect and carry out the law
deities.anathemas: Conceal and keep information secret, break an oath, subvert authority

deities.name: Lissala (Divine Mysteries)
deities.edicts: Work hard and demand others do so as well, cooperate or avoid conflict with ophidian creatures
deities.anathemas: Disobey a superior, shirk your duties, destroy a book

deities.name: Lorris
deities.edicts: Give to those less fortunate than you, help orphans find safe housing, assist those in need
deities.anathemas: Ignore the needs of others when they ask for your help, take from widows or orphans, contribute to the destruction of housing for the unfortunate

deities.name: Lorthact
deities.edicts: Learn arcane secrets, take from others what you cannot make yourself, rule from the shadows
deities.anathemas: Reveal your actual identity, share power with the weak

deities.name: Lubaiko
deities.edicts: Set fires, change the world, act with ambition or not at all
deities.anathemas: Calm a crowd, douse a fire, sleep in the same place three nights in a row

deities.name: Luhar
deities.edicts: Learn about the night and prepare yourself to face its creatures and dangers, always make time for sleeping and dreams, ensure others never go to sleep scared
deities.anathemas: Stay up all night without any breaks for sleeping or dreaming, attack a person or creature while they sleep, leave a badly wounded opponent alive and suffering, create undead or ask questions of the dead

deities.name: Lurlup
deities.edicts: Feed upon everything in your surroundings
deities.anathemas: Be fussy with your food, choose one meal over another, waste a meal

deities.name: Lymnieris
deities.edicts: Help others achieve their desires, aid and protect sex workers, help others through difficult transitions
deities.anathemas: Persecute sex workers, force or support unwanted marriages

deities.name: Lysianassa
deities.edicts: Change to avoid stagnation, promote life and growth, respect and aid the flow of natural cycles, swim
deities.anathemas: Dam a river, disrespect sincere gifts of water or drink, pollute clean bodies of water

deities.name: Ma'at
deities.edicts: Defend civilization from chaos, live an honest and just life, be impartial in judgment and reveal the truth
deities.anathemas: Deal unfairly with your family or community, destroy the environment, lie

deities.name: Magdh
deities.edicts: Use magic to read the future and understand fate
deities.anathemas: Lie, share your magic readings without payment (no matter how trivial)

deities.name: Magrim
deities.edicts: Perfect a craft or trade, carve runes, destroy undead, aid others with completing unfinished tasks
deities.anathemas: Treat grave sites irreverently, mistreat your tools, create undead, damage a soul

deities.name: Mahathallah
deities.edicts: Become an arbiter of reality, capitalize on the ignorance of others, reject conventional wisdom as falsehood
deities.anathemas: Become too invested in mortal affairs, refuse to hear a truth out of preference for ignorance

deities.name: Mahja Firehair
deities.edicts: Bring honor and glory to orcs, build up your community, seek personal perfection
deities.anathemas: Undermine your community, seek personal glory, grant redemption to the unworthy

deities.name: Malthus
deities.edicts: Scan your surroundings from above, join form with function, waste as an act of luxury
deities.anathemas: Take impulsive action, demolish buildings, take in moderation

deities.name: Mammon
deities.edicts: Gain financial control over others, gather new wealth, count your riches
deities.anathemas: Leave the cult of Mammon, allow those who steal from you to go unpunished

deities.name: Marishi
deities.edicts: Celebrate success, compete honorably, strive for victory, show pride in your accomplishments
deities.anathemas: Bully a competitor; deny a worthy victor their celebration or reward; cheat at a competition, contest, game, or sport

deities.name: Matravash
deities.edicts: Aid the persecuted, accommodate and facilitate others, practice contemplation and restraint
deities.anathemas: Destroy lotus fields, interfere with the flow of the Matra river, pollute clean water, reveal the location of non-evil fugitives

deities.name: Mazludeh
deities.edicts: Seek to improve yourself and your community, trust those you work with, encourage cooperation
deities.anathemas: Betray another’s trust, place conflict between ideological differences over people’s lives

deities.name: Ma’at
deities.edicts: Defend civilization from chaos, live an honest and just life, be impartial in judgment and reveal the truth
deities.anathemas: Deal unfairly with your family or community, destroy the environment, lie

deities.name: Mephistopheles
deities.edicts: Master laws and use them to your benefit, enable the desperate, excoriate others with veiled mockery
deities.anathemas: Break a contract you made, get caught breaking the law

deities.name: Mestama
deities.edicts: Enact disproportionate vengeance, manipulate others to enact your plans, tear down your rivals through both subtlety and violence
deities.anathemas: Declare your schemes openly, harm an allied witch or hag

deities.name: Mhar
deities.edicts: Cause tectonic disasters, destroy objects and creatures using fire
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Milani
deities.edicts: confront oppression in all its forms, defend the common folk, overcome despair to sieve victory
deities.anathemas: abandon those in need, enslave or oppress others, harm the innocent through direct or inadvertent action

deities.name: Minderhal
deities.edicts: Strictly follow established tradition, conquer the weak, obey those in power
deities.anathemas: Break tradition, question those with greater positional power, provide succor to those who have turned their backs on Minderhal

deities.name: Moloch
deities.edicts: Spread Hell’s order through war, convert communities to sole worship of Moloch, sacrifice creatures in fire
deities.anathemas: Defy a military superior, flee in battle (unless ordered to do so), lose your combat edge due to your vices

deities.name: Monad
deities.edicts: Ensure balance between opposing forces, mediate disagreements
deities.anathemas: Allow your personal motivations to determine a major decision

deities.name: Mother Vulture
deities.edicts: Recycle rot and waste into useful creations, eat the flesh of your own people, kill without mercy if it benefits your community, help to raise children
deities.anathemas: Poison insects or scavengers, waste food or good materials, allow rot to poison an area, create undead

deities.name: Mrtyu
deities.edicts: Destroy undead, honor fallen soldiers, hear the confessions of the dying, put malcontent spirits to rest
deities.anathemas: Create undead, deny your emotions, shame others for emotional outbursts

deities.name: Mugura and Nrithu
deities.edicts: practice until perfect, create stories and relationships, trust and listen to your partner
deities.anathemas: steal credit from others, upstage or sabotage, spread rumors to get ahead

deities.name: Musagani
deities.edicts: disrupt organizations, slay creatures larger than you, prevent resurrection or reincarnation
deities.anathemas: provide aid to a samsaran , restore a non- nindoru creature to life, willingly reduce your size

deities.name: Myr
deities.edicts: Strive for perfection in mind and body, respect and honor those who came before you, use your means to aid the less fortunate
deities.anathemas: Take life needlessly, take from those less fortunate, ignore someone in need

deities.name: Naderi
deities.edicts: Comfort and encourage lovers, help the suffering escape their circumstances in life or in death
deities.anathemas: Dismiss or mock a creature’s grief, separate lovers, torture a creature

deities.name: Nalinivati
deities.edicts: seek out magic and use it, use poison, heal poisons, bear or adopt children, raise snakes
deities.anathemas: kill a harmless snake or swan, spurn friends due to jealousy or romantic competition, betray your offspring, separate lovers

deities.name: Nameless
deities.edicts: Crush the confident and arrogant, incite rebellion against just and unjust rulers alike, sow doubt from the shadows
deities.anathemas: Hold a position of authority for more than a day, seek power for any reason but destroying those in power

deities.name: Narakaas
deities.edicts: Help others through painful changes, offer harsh punishments to the penitent, seek and allow redemption
deities.anathemas: Torture an unwilling creature, take joy in suffering

deities.name: Narriseminek
deities.edicts: Divine the future, transform the bodies of willing creatures, rebel against organized structures
deities.anathemas: Refuse to speak to a keketar, eschew a challenge by turning down a promotion or an advancement

deities.name: Neith
deities.edicts: Protect the dead, open pathways, aid single mothers, lend your prowess to hunts and war
deities.anathemas: Disrupt the cosmic balance, trap a soul, pollute waterways

deities.name: Nephthys
deities.edicts: Mourn the dead and prepare them for burial, protect rightful rulers, assist childbirths, drink beer and celebrate
deities.anathemas: Mock the grieving, desecrate a corpse, refuse food to a child

deities.name: Nergal
deities.edicts: Consume fungus and fermented or germinated foods, mutilate the dead, spread sickness
deities.anathemas: Deliberately smell a benign flower, use soap, burn or cremate the dead

deities.name: Neshen
deities.edicts: Lead others to the light of good, strive for self-perfection, be a support for others struggling to change their ways
deities.anathemas: Stop taking care of yourself, wallow in self-pity, refuse to right past wrongs.

deities.name: Nethys
deities.edicts: seek out magical power and use it
deities.anathemas: continually pursue mundane paths over magical ones

deities.name: Ng
deities.edicts: Travel, hide your identity and your motives
deities.anathemas: Sleep in the same place twice in a row, wear seasonal decorations out of season

deities.name: Nhimbaloth
deities.edicts: Create undead, feast upon carnivores that have recently feasted upon others
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Nin
deities.edicts: become a paragon of vampiric perfection, eliminate vampiric weaknesses using analysis and experimentation, punish those who restrict the free exchange of information
deities.anathemas: demonstrate apathy or complacency toward selfimprovement, fail to cooperate or share information with another worshipper of Nin, refuse to attempt to find a solution when presented with a problem
deities.source_book: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun
deities.source_text: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun pg. 77

deities.name: Nivi Rhombodazzle
deities.edicts: learn the rules and strategies of games of chance played wherever you travel, take risks and savor the consequences whether good or ill, use stealth and guile over violence when dealing with the fallout from your risk-taking
deities.anathemas: break the established rules or terms of a wager, use violence to avoid the consequences of a wager

deities.name: Nocticula
deities.edicts: create art true to yourself, protect marginalized artists, punish those who take advantage of offered trust and shelter
deities.anathemas: deny shelter to the desperate, destroy harmless art you dislike, finish a work of art during daylight hours

deities.name: Nocticula (Pathfinder Adventure Path #219: Lord of the Trinity Star)
deities.edicts: create art true to yourself, protect marginalized artists, punish those who take advantage of offered trust and shelter
deities.anathemas: deny shelter to the desperate, destroy harmless art you dislike, finish a work of art during daylight hours
deities.source_book: Pathfinder Adventure Path #219: Lord of the Trinity Star
deities.source_text: Pathfinder Adventure Path #219: Lord of the Trinity Star pg. 67

deities.name: Norgorber
deities.edicts: keep your true identity secret, sacrifice anyone necessary, take every advantage in a fight, work from the shadows
deities.anathemas: allow your true identity to be connected to your foul dealings, share a secret freely, show mercy

deities.name: Nulgreth
deities.edicts: Bathe in the blood of your fallen enemies, face your enemies head-on, never turn down a fight you can win
deities.anathemas: Grant or accept mercy, take prisoners, perform underhanded tricks

deities.name: Nurgal
deities.edicts: Wage war in the desert, deny water to your foes
deities.anathemas: Heal a sunburn, change your name

deities.name: Nyarlathotep (Haunter in the Dark)
deities.edicts: Create darkness, encourage authorities to bring the apocalypse
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Nyarlathotep (The Crawling Chaos)
deities.edicts: Sow discord among allies, misuse positions of authority by steering events toward apocalyptic ends
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Nyarlathotep (The Faceless Sphinx)
deities.edicts: Indoctrinate the desperate and needy, influence institutions of power to hasten the end of the world
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Nyarlathotep (The Veiled Voice)
deities.edicts: Innovate destructive alchemy or magic, instigate conflict between your enemies, share dangerous secrets
deities.anathemas: Bo Staff
devotee_benefits: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Nyuo-Ogh
deities.edicts: Kill other practitioners of magic, obliterate systems of education, watch your enemies and learn from them
deities.anathemas: Educate others, rely too much on magic

deities.name: Oathos
deities.edicts: Cure diseases, offer comfort to the downtrodden, create medicine and curatives
deities.anathemas: Mock the unwell, knowingly spread disease, knowingly boast of your fortune and health in the presence of someone who is suffering

deities.name: Oaur-Ooung
deities.edicts: Embrace all manner of change, pollute pristine waters, practice fleshwarping on yourself and others
deities.anathemas: Allow yourself to remain static through fear of change, engage in efforts to stem overpopulation

deities.name: Obari
deities.edicts: face unfamiliar challenges, travel to new places and seek new experiences, pursue dangerous or forbidden relationships
deities.anathemas: abandon a sworn lover, constantly pursue safe choices, shun change

deities.name: Olheon
deities.edicts: Rule with honor, guard the weak and oppressed, obey righteous laws
deities.anathemas: Oppress others, fail to challenge tyrants or unjust laws, break a sworn promise

deities.name: Ongalte
deities.edicts: ruin the reputation of other hero-gods, aid those whom the hero-gods have wronged, kill gods
deities.anathemas: make a sincere prayer to any other hero-god, perform deeds that ultimately glorify another hero-god

deities.name: Onos
deities.edicts: Mediate conflicts, respect each element equally, experience travel as often as possible
deities.anathemas: Act before weighing both sides, solve problems with aggression before negotiating, play favorites in negotiation

deities.name: Orcus
deities.edicts: Become undead through choice and skill, master necromantic magic, create undead
deities.anathemas: Become a vampire or accidental undead, give succor to faiths that seek to destroy undead

deities.name: Orgesh
deities.edicts: Surpass your peers in your chosen field at any cost, travel using subterranean waterways, use blood and toxic metals in alchemy
deities.anathemas: Outer Gods and Great Old Ones

deities.name: Osiris
deities.edicts: Ensure the health of crops and vegetation, protect the bodies and souls of the worthy dead, avenge the wrongly murdered
deities.anathemas: Dismember a creature, desecrate a corpse, show ingratitude for a sincere gift

deities.name: Otilaz
deities.edicts: learn from observed mistakes, promote change and growth, accept the inevitable
deities.anathemas: seek immortality or enlightenment, become stagnant, believe yourself a learned master

deities.name: Otolmens
deities.edicts: Relentlessly document and interpret data, correct cosmic errors
deities.anathemas: Suppress a factual report, ignore facts, misrepresent quantitative data

deities.name: Ozranvial
deities.edicts: Be amicable until the time is right to strike, give false hope to all, make the choice that will cause more pain
deities.anathemas: Apologize sincerely for your actions, show emotional vulnerability

deities.name: Pahti Coatl
deities.edicts: Attempt to help others return to a righteous path, seek out evils that threaten innocents, learn what you can about evil doers and the reasons for their actions
deities.anathemas: Refuse to outright destroy an overwhelming evil, strike down another without proving that they have done wrong, reject someone honestly seeking redemption

deities.name: Pavnuri
deities.edicts: Consume the flesh of your own kind, hoard secrets, never speak plainly when you can speak in metaphor or code
deities.anathemas: Feed another out of kindness or pity, give up an intimate secret without gain

deities.name: Pazuzu
deities.edicts: Tempt others to immoral acts, revel in flight, possess or magically influence others to cause calamities
deities.anathemas: Deny a flying creature the ability to fly, abuse Pazuzu’s name or call on Pazuzu for help, aid worshippers of Lamashtu

deities.name: Pharasma
deities.edicts: strive to understand ancient prophecies, destroy undead, lay bodies to rest
deities.anathemas: create undead, desecrate a corpse, take from the dead in bad faith

deities.name: Pharimia
deities.edicts: Guide others between places of safety, maintain travel infrastructure, unite contentious parties to achieve greater goals
deities.anathemas: Deny directions to the lost, extinguish a lighthouse or similar beacon, bring destruction upon Iblydos

deities.name: Phi Deva
deities.edicts: protect the defenseless, assist those who ask for your help, put the collective above yourself
deities.anathemas: harm the innocent, take more than you need, overturn a collective decision

deities.name: Phlegyas
deities.edicts: Allow atheists to hold their beliefs, challenge what is presupposed, forge a lasting legacy, live authentically, take pride in your work
deities.anathemas: Allow your accomplishments to go unattributed, destroy another artist’s legacy, misattribute or obscure the authorship of a work of art

deities.name: Picoperi
deities.edicts: Relish in jokes and pranks, lighten the mood, embrace surprises
deities.anathemas: Spoil the fun, use a prank to cause real harm

deities.name: Pillars of Knowledge
deities.edicts: Seek new knowledge, use your knowledge and skill to improve the world around you, protect knowledge from becoming lost
deities.anathemas: Choose to use old knowledge or tools after they have been improved upon, destroy knowledge, refuse to answer a query for which you know the answer

deities.name: Prophecies of Kalistrade
deities.edicts: accumulate personal wealth, seek enlightenment through purity of self, foster and aid mercantile pursuits, welcome newcomers regardless of gender or ancestry
deities.anathemas: spend money frivolously; offer money to those who don’t deserve wealth; overindulge in physical pleasures, food, or drink; give charity to others

deities.name: Ptah
deities.edicts: Craft your ideas into reality, encourage stability, listen to prayers, perform ceremonies as needed
deities.anathemas: Make shoddy or unsafe buildings, lie, enforce injustice, violate the protection of Ptah

deities.name: Pulura
deities.edicts: Aid travelers, comfort the lonely, teach the constellations
deities.anathemas: Mock the homesick, deny warmth to others, pollute the skies with smoke or light

deities.name: Qi Zhong
deities.edicts: teach knowledge to others, relieve suffering despite personal difficulty, heal sickness and injury
deities.anathemas: deal lethal damage to another living creature (unless as part of a necessary medical treatment)

deities.name: Ra
deities.edicts: Bring order to places of chaos, kill evil monsters and fiends, encourage just laws, provide warmth where needed
deities.anathemas: Avoid personal change, kill a plant or a creature with cold damage, seal a building to completely block sunlight

deities.name: Radiant Prism
deities.edicts: create works that inspire good acts, defend those who cannot defend themselves, pursue evil
deities.anathemas: allow evil to spread, destroy that which brings joy to others, fail to offer evil a chance to surrender

deities.name: Ragadahn
deities.edicts: Draw spirals, seek primordial secrets, use poison, always carry water
deities.anathemas: Suffer a linnorm’s death curse, destroy a fossil

deities.name: Ragathiel
deities.edicts: Avenge the wronged, destroy evildoers, lead the charge in battle
deities.anathemas: Cower from combat, forgive those who have irreparably sinned, leave allies unwillingly in darkness

deities.name: Ragdya
deities.edicts: Create humor in life, seek enlightenment through worldly experience, use harmless pranks to teach others
deities.anathemas: Discriminate based on social status, make a joke out someone’s suffering, take control of another’s life and agency

deities.name: Ranginori
deities.edicts: Open closed areas to fresh air, travel throughout your surroundings daily, fly or make creations that fly
deities.anathemas: Wrongfully imprison a creature, restrain a creature longer or more tightly than is necessary, suffocate a creature

deities.name: Raumya
deities.edicts: Improve yourself with music and literature, take what you want, seek power above others
deities.anathemas: Abuse a loyal subject, harm or kill a non-combatant

deities.name: Ravithra
deities.edicts: Enforce karma’s pitiless judgment, shame fools, kill traitors, pursue the Chalice of Amrit
deities.anathemas: Make decisions erratically or randomly, provide aid to Vasaghati or her followers, engage in treachery

deities.name: Razmir
deities.edicts: follow the path of the 31 steps, obey those who speak with Razmir’s voice, pay tithes and tributes to the Living God
deities.anathemas: disobey Razmir or one of his priests, question the truth of the Living God
